name: mamekit
description: Knowledge-graph-first transpiler: MAME driver source -> runnable browser (canvas) emulator app

scripts.gen:all: npm run clean && for g in pacman pooyan timeplt invaders galaxian galaga digdug mpatrol rocnrope junofrst; do node bin/mamekit.js $g --skip-app || exit 1; done && node bin/mamekit.js --build-runtime --build-app --targets pacman,pooyan,timeplt,invaders,galaxian,galaga,digdug,mpatrol,rocnrope,junofrst
scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:current
scripts.test:unit: tsc --noEmit && for f in $(find src -name '*.spec.ts' -type f | sort); do node $f > /dev/null || { echo "FAIL $f"; exit 1; }; echo "PASS $f"; done
scripts.test:current: npm run gen:all && npm run audit:generated
